hero.badge: v2.0 is now live with enhanced Analytics
hero.title: Unified Management for
hero.subtitle: Seamlessly integrate Accounting, HR, and Inventory across borders. Built for teams in Jordan, KSA, Germany, and beyond with native compliance.

features.title: Everything you need to run your business
features.subtitle: UnifiedCore brings all your critical business functions into one seamless platform.

accounting.title: Advanced Accounting
accounting.description: Multi-currency, tax-compliant ledgers for Jordan, KSA, and Germany.

hr.title: Global HR & Payroll
hr.description: Manage diverse teams with country-specific labor laws and payroll rules.

inventory.title: Smart Inventory
inventory.description: Real-time stock tracking across multiple warehouses and locations.

security.title: Enterprise Security
security.description: Role-based access control (RBAC), audit logs, and data encryption.

localization.title: Native Localization
localization.description: Built-in RTL support for Arabic and localized date/number formats.

analytics.title: Real-time Analytics
analytics.description: Actionable insights with customizable dashboards and reports.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your business scale.

footer.tagline: The complete operating system for modern global businesses.
